```
├── RecipeCommunity/          (Server - SSR pages)
│   ├── Models/Recipe.cs      (Recipe model + sample data)
│   └── Components/Pages/
│       ├── Home.razor        (Homepage with category cards)
│       ├── Recipes.razor     (Browse recipes by category)
│       └── RecipeDetail.razor (Single recipe view + rating)
├── RecipeCommunity.Client/   (WebAssembly - interactive components)
│   └── Pages/
│       ├── StarRating.razor  (Click-to-rate 1–5 stars widget)
│       └── SubmitRecipe.razor (Form: title, category, ingredients, steps)
```

### Key design decisions
- **SSR for read-only pages** (Home, Recipes list, Recipe detail) — fast initial load, no JS needed
- **Interactive WebAssembly** only where needed: the `StarRating` widget and `SubmitRecipe` form
- Sample data includes 9 recipes across 6 categories
- Form uses `DataAnnotationsValidator` for validation
- Star rating uses hover/click interaction with visual feedback

Run with: `cd RecipeCommunity/RecipeCommunity && dotnet run`
